title: What was the result of the hackathon?
excerpt:
I signed up for the announcement video but didn’t receive the link! 
Will there be a post with the results?

posts.author: matthewlockyer (Matthew Lockyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I signed up for the announcement video but didn’t receive the link!

Will there be a post with the results?

posts.author: mikecairns1 (Mike Cairns)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, the date on when the results would be posted has passed and still no update.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @matthewlockyer and @mikecairns1

Sorry for the lack of communication from our end on this! There should have been an email sent out from devpost’s end on this, according to this comment here:

monday.com Apps Marketplace Challenge: solutions for teams

monday.com Apps Marketplace Challenge: solutions for teams

Build a work-altering app for one of these teams for the chance to win big! With $184,000 in total prizes we are giving away 3 Teslas, 10 MacBooks, and more!

Let me know if this helps

-Alex

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
